<!-- Thanks for contributing to Goals! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What

<!-- What does this change do? One or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem it solves, or the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Checks

<!-- These mirror CI — run them locally first (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] Ran `uv run pytest -q tests/test_skill_hygiene.py` if I touched skills, commands, or `goals ...` examples
- [ ] The diff is focused — unrelated changes are in separate PRs
